central_schemes.name: PM Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
central_schemes.benefit: Free LPG connection + 1st refill + regulator for BPL women
central_schemes.eligibility: BPL women without any existing LPG connection

central_schemes.name: PM Surya Ghar (Muft Bijli Yojana)
central_schemes.benefit: 300 units free electricity/month via rooftop solar + subsidy up to Rs 78K

central_schemes.name: KUSUM Scheme (Solar for Farmers)
central_schemes.benefit: 60% subsidy on solar pump + 25 years income from solar power
central_schemes.eligibility: Farmers with or without grid connectivity

central_schemes.name: Saubhagya (Household Electrification)
central_schemes.benefit: Free electricity connection to BPL households
central_schemes.eligibility: Un-electrified households (BPL: free, others: Rs 500 in installments)

central_schemes.name: Gram Ujala Programme
central_schemes.benefit: LED bulbs at Rs 10/piece for rural homes
central_schemes.eligibility: Rural electricity consumers against old incandescent bulbs

central_schemes.name: PM PAHAL (Direct Benefit for LPG)
central_schemes.benefit: LPG subsidy directly transferred to bank account (DBTL)
central_schemes.eligibility: All LPG consumers who surrender subsidy eligibility voluntarily excluded

central_schemes.name: National Solar Mission (Grid-Connected)
central_schemes.benefit: Rooftop solar subsidy 20-40% for residential and institutional

central_schemes.name: Biogas Scheme (New National Biogas Programme)
central_schemes.benefit: Rs 7,000-20,000 subsidy for family-type biogas plants

central_schemes.name: PM E-Bus Sewa
central_schemes.benefit: Electric bus connectivity for tier 2/3 cities

central_schemes.name: Energy Efficiency Scheme for MSMEs
central_schemes.benefit: Subsidized energy audit + financing for energy efficiency upgrades

central_schemes.name: National Wind-Solar Hybrid Policy
central_schemes.benefit: Better grid access and PPAs for hybrid renewable energy projects
central_schemes.eligibility: Renewable energy project developers and investors

central_schemes.name: Solar Charkha Mission
central_schemes.benefit: Solar-powered charkha units + subsidy for handloom weavers
central_schemes.eligibility: Handloom weavers, artisans in notified clusters

central_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri JI-VAN Yojana (Biofuel)
central_schemes.benefit: Financial support for 2G ethanol bio-refineries (Rs 1969.50 crore total)

central_schemes.name: National Clean Air Programme (NCAP)
central_schemes.benefit: Cleaner air initiatives, EV subsidies, clean fuel access in polluted cities

state_schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5,000-30,000 subsidy on electric 2-wheelers + scrapping incentive
200 units free electricity per month for domestic consumers
state_schemes.benefit_hi: घरेलू उपभोक्ताओं को 200 यूनिट मुफ्त बिजली प्रतिमाह
state_schemes.eligibility: Karnataka domestic electricity consumers using ≤ 200 units/month

state_schemes.benefit_en: Free electricity connection to all unelectrified households
state_schemes.benefit_hi: सभी बिना बिजली घरों को मुफ्त कनेक्शन

state_schemes.benefit_en: 300 units free electricity per month for domestic consumers
state_schemes.benefit_hi: घरेलू उपभोक्ताओं को 300 यूनिट मुफ्त बिजली

state_schemes.benefit_en: 30% subsidy on solar water heaters for domestic use
state_schemes.benefit_hi: घरेलू उपयोग के सौर वाटर हीटर पर 30% सब्सिडी
state_schemes.eligibility: Haryana domestic consumers with electricity connection

state_schemes.benefit_en: Daytime (5am-9pm) electricity supply to farmers for irrigation
state_schemes.benefit_hi: किसानों को सिंचाई के लिए दिन में बिजली (5AM-9PM)
